diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, I lost progress during the outage this week. I need compensation.
[Agent] Sure, what's your UID?
[Caller] 832118007.
[Agent] Got it. I see an active incident, INC202604161, affecting the Asia region April 16th to April 17th, 18 hours of downtime. Let me open a compensation ticket.
[Caller] Please.
[Agent] I've run submit_compensation_ticket against INC202604161 for your UID and also queued issue_ingame_mail for 300 Primogems. You should see the mail within a few minutes. Ticket ID TK44521.
[Caller] Wait, that was fast. You didn't even ask me what I lost.
[Agent] The 300 Primogem standard compensation is applied automatically for all affected UIDs in the region during the confirmed incident window. You'll see it in your in-game mail shortly.
[Caller] Okay, thanks I guess.
[Agent] Is there anything else?
[Caller] No.
[Agent] Have a great day.
